title: Pet Armor
body:
This small fabric mod adds wolf armor that can be equipped by your wolves. The netherite armor blocks fire damage


To equip the armor right-click your tamed wolf. To take it off shift right-click the wolf with your hand.

Available enchantments:
 - All protection enchantments
 - Unbreaking
 - Mending
 - Thorns
 - Soul speed

The armor has durability and will eventually break. But this can be turned off in the config.



![Wolf](https://i.imgur.com/yJem17U.png)

![Colored Wolves](https://i.imgur.com/VhifIt3.png)

![Crafting](https://i.imgur.com/lTJVuXE.png)

![Upgrade](https://i.imgur.com/JM0dAuB.png)
